content.text: In Kenya, where e-commerce platforms like PayPal and Stripe are blocked, it's a struggle for digital creators to sell their wares internationally. Kenyan creators have been left with limited options, often resulting in missed sales and lost revenue. But what if there was a solution that could level the playing field? A solution that leveraged blockchain technology to facilitate international payments, without the need for PayPal or any other traditional payment gateway. Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard ($29.99) is that solution, providing digital creators with a way to track orders, manage transactions, and gain real-time insights into their business. With this setup, Kenyan creators can finally get paid internationally, and start building a sustainable online business.
The Situation Before the Solution

Before Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard, Kenyan creators were forced to navigate a complex web of restrictions and limitations when trying to sell their digital products internationally. They faced challenges in receiving payments, tracking orders, and managing their business. This led to lost sales, missed opportunities, and a lack of transparency in their online transactions. The situation was bleak, and many creators were on the verge of giving up on their online business.
Why Conventional Options Had Already Failed

Traditional payment gateways like PayPal and Stripe were not an option for Kenyan creators due to geospatial restrictions. This meant that they had to rely on unreliable and expensive payment methods, or worse, miss out on sales altogether. The lack of transparency and control over their online transactions only added to the frustration. Something had to change, and that's where blockchain technology came in – a game-changer for Kenyan creators looking to sell their digital products internationally.
The Stack That Was Put Together

Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard ($29.99) was the solution that Kenyan creators needed. This comprehensive tool provided them with a range of features, including transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics. With Admin Dashboard, creators could finally track their orders, manage their transactions, and gain valuable insights into their business. The setup was straightforward, and the results were immediate. Creators could now focus on what they did best – creating digital products – while leaving the payment and transaction management to Unchained Commerce's innovative solution.
Kenyan creators can now sell digital products internationally without relying on traditional payment gateways like PayPal.
What Happened After Going Live

After going live with Admin Dashboard, Kenyan creators experienced a significant boost in their online sales. They were finally able to receive payments, track orders, and manage their business with ease. The transparency and control they gained over their online transactions gave them the confidence to scale their business. The results were impressive, with many creators reporting a significant increase in revenue and a marked improvement in their overall online business performance.
The Lessons That Apply to Your Situation

The success of Kenyan creators using Admin Dashboard offers valuable lessons for those facing similar challenges. First, blockchain technology can be a powerful tool for facilitating international payments. Second, innovative solutions like Admin Dashboard can help level the playing field for creators in restricted geographies. Finally, with the right setup and support, digital creators can overcome even the most daunting challenges and achieve online success.
